title: How to round time to the nearest 15 minutes
task: Snap clock-in/clock-out or log times to the nearest quarter hour for billing and timesheets.

excel.note: CEILING/FLOOR with TIME(0,15,0) round strictly up or down instead.

explanation: Times are day-fractions, so MROUND with a 15-minute step (TIME(0,15,0)) snaps to the nearest quarter hour: 9:07 is closer to 9:00 than 9:15, so it rounds down; 9:08 would round up. Billing that always rounds in one direction uses CEILING (up) or FLOOR (down) with the same step — and the step is arbitrary: TIME(0,6,0) gives tenth-of-an-hour rounding.
